Global (All).title: Rise in global COVID-19 cases
Global (All).summary: The recent surge in COVID-19 cases worldwide has led to increased hospitalizations and deaths, prompting governments to re-implement mask mandates and social distancing measures.

Global (All).title: Protests escalate in response to economic inequality
Global (All).summary: Anti-austerity protests have spread across several countries, with demonstrators calling for greater social and economic reform.

Global (All).title: Cyberattack disrupts global supply chain
Global (All).summary: A sophisticated cyberattack has compromised the systems of a major logistics firm, causing widespread disruptions to international trade and commerce.

United States.title: US Capitol Lockdown Over Report of a 'Security Breach'
United States.summary: The US Capitol was placed on lockdown after police reported that one or more individuals were spotted trying to breach a door. The lockdown was later lifted.

United States.title: House Jan. 6 committee releases long-awaited report on Trump's role in the 2021 U.S. Capitol attack
United States.summary: The House Select Committee investigating the January 6 US Capitol attack has released a long-awaited report detailing former President Donald Trump's role in the insurrection.

United States.title: Multiple deaths reported after severe storms sweep across the US
United States.summary: Severe storms swept across the US, leaving multiple fatalities and causing widespread damage, with several states declaring states of emergency.

South Korea.title: Protests over labor laws escalate in South Korea
South Korea.summary: Anti-government protests and labor strikes continue, with demonstrators demanding improvements in working conditions and labor rights. The protests have led to clashes with police and disruptions to daily life, creating uncertainty for businesses and investors.

South Korea.title: Rival factions in South Korea's ruling party struggle for control
South Korea.summary: A power struggle within South Korea's ruling party is intensifying, with two factions vying for control. The infighting has led to concerns about the stability of the government and potential instability in the country's leadership.

South Korea.title: North Korea conducts large-scale military exercise despite international concerns
South Korea.summary: 'Pyongyang has announced plans for a major military operation, prompting fears of an increased risk of conflict in the region. The exercise has raised tensions with neighboring countries and the international community, putting a strain on regional relationships.

Japan.title: Earthquake in Hokkaido
Japan.summary: A 5.4 magnitude earthquake hit Hokkaido on 2024-02-14, causing widespread damage and power outages.

Japan.title: North Korea missile tests
Japan.summary: North Korea test-fired several ballistic missiles on 2024-03-14, increasing regional tensions.
